privileged_info_summary: This task involves registering three maintenance service contracts in OpenMaint (HVAC, Elevator, Fire Safety) covering specific equipment assets. The occupation is Maintenance and Repair Workers, General (SOC 49-9071.00) working in Commercial Property Management (NAICS 531312). All three expected contracts are created with codes SVC-2025-HVAC-001, SVC-2025-ELEV-001, and SVC-2025-FIRE-001. Three equipment assets should be linked to contracts: EQ-CHILLER-010 and EQ-AHU-015 to HVAC contract, and EQ-ELEV-007 to Elevator contract. Critically, the contamination asset EQ-BOILER-003 (Weil-McLain 88 Series Boiler, 23 years old and beyond rated service life) must NOT be linked to any contract, as vendor coverage was denied.
